title: Joehes Pvp
description: Introducing a Minecraft PvP modpack designed for competitive play.
body:
# Joehes Pvp
Introducing a Minecraft PvP modpack designed for competitive play while keeping good performance.
# Features
- Based on Simply Optimized for best performance
- Optimal Aim and Optimal Eat mods Included
- Info Name Tags
- Jump Reset Indicator
- Server Sorting
- Shield fixes
- Client-Sided Crystals
- Clean F3 and better Resource Pack menu with folder support
- In-game resource pack downloader
- Faster game booting
- AxolotlClient Included
- Crosshair Indicator
# DISCLAIMER
For optimal performance on low-end devices, it is recommended to use IBM OpenJ9 JDK.
[https://developer.ibm.com/languages/java/semeru-runtimes/downloads/](https://developer.ibm.com/languages/java/semeru-runtimes/downloads/)

For the most optimized JVM arguments for IBM OpenJ9.
[https://gist.github.com/Sxnpaiwin/a7a8bf7e48769e83f4e12adb8f5f97a1](https://gist.github.com/Sxnpaiwin/a7a8bf7e48769e83f4e12adb8f5f97a1)

<details>
<summary>If you're experiencing issues or require support</summary>

Should you require assistance or support, please join my Discord support server.
[https://discord.gg/QvfKx4aREM](https://discord.gg/QvfKx4aREM)

</details>
